entryRequirements.visaNote: Many Western nationalities visa-free for tourism up to 90 days.
entryRequirements.officialSource: Taiwan Bureau of Consular Affairs, Ministry of Foreign Affairs

transportInfo.paymentCard: EasyCard (tap-to-pay on MRT, buses, and many convenience stores/shops)
mainSystems: YouBike (bike share, very popular and EasyCard-compatible)
transportInfo.note: Taiwan uses two separate emergency numbers (110/119), not a single unified one — worth noting clearly since many travelers expect one number.

publicHolidays2026.name: Children's Day / Tomb Sweeping Day cluster

majorEventsNote: Lunar New Year is by far Taiwan's biggest holiday — many small businesses close for several days.
